Patch Set 36:

@Michael, as for your comment regarding test. what I did was build and then startup the 5 dockers. It looked all OK. besides, what kinds of tests are needed? could you specify them, so I can run those tests asap.

Patch Set 31:

please run our automation suit it can be executed by adding the -tad to the docker run.

Patch Set 36: Code-Review+1

please provide input after automation execution.

Patch Set 36:

HI, Michael
the command I use is ./sdc-os-chef/scripts/docker_run.sh -e AUTO  -l -tad and api tests related shell output is 

docker run sdc-api-tests...
Trigger sdc-api-tests docker, please wait...
2ee097b6e137c17d2f33022db17a50415468733b0e4bc67b4b4d944888b53e46
Monitor sdc-api-tests Docker
MATCH is -- [execute] DOCKER STARTED
DOCKER start finished in 0 seconds

besides, the output files under /data/logs/sdc-api-tests has been uploaded to JIRA SDC-1415
